DebugWarning: Please note you have debug mode turned on. It isn't recommended to leave this on unless you have a purpose for it.
cfg.debug_logging.name: Debug Logging
cfg.debug_logging.desc: Write verbose teleport and location diagnostics to the BepInEx console. Leave off for normal play.
cfg.increase_menu_animation_speed.name: Increase Menu Animation Speed
cfg.increase_menu_animation_speed.desc: Speed up the teleport menu's open and close animation for snappier navigation.
cfg.enable_list_expansion.name: Enable List Expansion
cfg.enable_list_expansion.desc: Expand the visible locations list so more locations fit on screen at once.
cfg.gerry_appears.name: Gerry Appears
cfg.gerry_appears.desc: When on, Gerry appears at each teleport destination as a little story beat. Off for silent instant teleports.
cfg.cinematic_effect.name: Cinematic Effect
cfg.cinematic_effect.desc: Play a brief fade effect when teleporting.
cfg.gerry_charges.name: Gerry Charges
cfg.gerry_charges.desc: Charge money for each non-starter teleport. Turn off to make teleports free.
cfg.enable_previous_page_choices.name: Enable Previous Page Choices
cfg.enable_previous_page_choices.desc: Show a back-to-previous-page entry in the teleport menu.
cfg.previous_page_choice_at_top.name: Previous Page Choice At Top
cfg.previous_page_choice_at_top.desc: Put the back-to-previous-page entry at the top of the list instead of the bottom.
cfg.teleport_menu_keybind.name: Teleport Menu Keybind
cfg.teleport_menu_keybind.desc: Keybind for opening the teleport menu.
cfg.teleport_menu_controller_button.name: Teleport Menu Controller Button
cfg.teleport_menu_controller_button.desc: Gamepad button for opening the teleport menu.
cfg.locations_per_page.name: Locations Per Page
cfg.locations_per_page.desc: How many locations to show per page in the teleport menu.
cfg.sort_alphabetically.name: Sort Alphabetically
cfg.sort_alphabetically.desc: Sort visible locations alphabetically. Off uses the game's default order.
cfg.restrict_to_found_locations.name: Restrict To Found Locations
cfg.restrict_to_found_locations.desc: Only show locations you've already discovered. Off shows every location regardless of progress.
cfg.enable_custom_locations.name: Enable Custom Locations
cfg.enable_custom_locations.desc: Allow saving and loading custom teleport points at your current position.
cfg.save_custom_location_keybind.name: Save Custom Location Keybind
cfg.save_custom_location_keybind.desc: Keybind for saving the current spot as a custom teleport location.
cfg.reload_custom_locations_keybind.name: Reload Custom Locations Keybind
cfg.reload_custom_locations_keybind.desc: Keybind for reloading the custom locations file from disk after editing it externally.
cfg.save_custom_location_controller_butt: Gamepad button for saving the current spot as a custom teleport location.
cfg.open_new_location_file_on_save.name: Open New Location File On Save
cfg.open_new_location_file_on_save.desc: Open the custom locations file in your text editor after saving so you can name the new entry.
cfg.check_for_updates.name: Check for Updates
cfg.check_for_updates.desc: Show a notice on the main menu when a newer version of this mod is available on NexusMods. Click the notice to open the mod's page.
cfg.location.toggle_desc: Toggle visibility of {0} in the menu.
cfg.print_known.name: Print Known
cfg.print_known.desc: Dump known NPCs, zones, one-time crafts and unlocked/blacklisted phrases to the BepInEx log. Handy for diagnostics.
runtime.cant_use_here: I can’t use that here, boss!
runtime.dont_know: I don't know where that is!
runtime.in_tutorial: I can’t do that just yet! Something about a tutorial….
runtime.in_tutorial_no_stone: I can’t do that just yet! Something about a tutorial - and you don’t have a teleport stone.
runtime.where_is_it: Where did I leave that stone...
runtime.money.4: You'll make it back in no time.
